[TITLE]: Joe Biden's close relationship with teen granddaughter - 9Honey
[METADATA/INTRO]: Presidential hopeful Joe Biden shows off close relationship with teen granddaughter By Jo Abi|...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: Presidential hopeful Joe Biden shows off close relationship with teen granddaughter 
 Democratic candidate hopeful Joe Biden has been joined on the campaign trail by his teenage granddaughter Finnegan, 19. 
 Former Vice President Biden, 77, is running to be the Democratic candidate ahead of the next presidential election in November, 2020. 
 He was spotted kissing his granddaughter on the lips while giving a speech at a campaign event at Clarke University in Dubuque, Iowa, on Sunday ahead of the Iowa caucuses, a biennial electoral events for members of the Democratic and Republican Parties. 
 Finnegan is the daughter of Biden's son Hunter. She stood proudly by her grandfather's side as he met with members of the crowd, hugging supporters and meeting their children.

[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: Democratic presidential candidate former Vice President Joe Biden, right, kisses his granddaughter Finnegan Biden during a campaign event. Photo / AP 
 A photo of Joe Biden kissing his granddaughter on the lips during an Iowa rally has left many unsettled by the image — but others believe there is no problem with the affectionate gesture. 
 The former vice president walked into Clarke University in Dubuque holding Finnegan Biden's hand, the daughterof his son Hunter. 
 "I would like to introduce you to my granddaughter Finnegan Biden. The reason I asked Finnegan — grandfathers are always allowed to embarrass their granddaughters — that goes along with the territory," said Biden, 77, with his hand over her shoulder.

[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: Joe Biden kisses granddaughter Natalie before slamming Donald Trump as 'guy you want to smack' 
 Joe Biden was joined by the daughter of his late son Beau as spoke in his hometown of Scranton, Pennsylvania, to support Kamala Harris 
 Joe Biden kissed his granddaughter at a rally in his hometown before slamming Donald Trump as "the guy you want to smack". 
 Biden, 81, was joined on stage by his granddaughter Natalie as he addressed the carpenters' union in his hometown of Scranton, Pennsylvania. Natalie is the daughter of his late son Beau, who died at age 46 from glioblastoma cancer.
